items.title: Seasonal Fishing Ban (India)
items.summary: Annual monsoon fishing ban varies by coast: 15 Apr–14 Jun (East), 1 Jun–31 Jul (West).
items.penalties: Seizure of gear and fines per state rules.

items.title: Coastal Regulation Zone (CRZ) Notification
items.summary: Regulates activities along India's coastline to protect ecosystems and livelihoods.

items.title: Biological Diversity Act, 2002
items.summary: Conservation and sustainable use of biological resources including marine species.

items.title: MPEDA Quality Standards
items.summary: Quality norms and traceability for marine product exports.
